hints.text: Plates **black w/ white lettering + a yellow-and-red emblem** near the left (looks grey through blur, emblem colours visible)
All coverage is **low-cam** (bigger blur, low angle) — only Switzerland & Japan are also always low-cam
Flat **Rhine Valley** with tall mountains in almost every direction (especially towering to the east); lots of pasture
Bollards **B&W cylindrical, rounded top, often a blue side attachment** (wedge design on guardrails); Switzerland near-identical
Bus stops = green-and-white with **LIEMOBIL** written on top
Directional signs white (small roads) / blue (big roads) w/ a pointed arrowhead; pedestrian sign = **7 stripes** in a tall rectangle (identical to Switzerland)
Alpine + modern architecture; town-specific bus stops (**Vaduz** red, **Balzers** black); Triesenberg on the eastern mountain slope
